description: [ELON] Add GET /api/shopify/status endpoint returning { connected: boolean, shop_domain: string, last_sync: timestamp, orders_synced: number }. Add POST /api/shopify/sync-now endpoint to trigger manual reconciliation (admin-only, requires MANAGE_INTEGRATIONS permission). Update /health endpoint to include Shopify connection status.
successCriteria: Admin users can call sync-now, non-admins get 403
